contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Fix stale inventory records — root cause unauthorized column S + sentinel implementation
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/124
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/366
  
  Details:
  Investigated why inventory movements were showing unauthorized despite being submitted by a governor. Root cause: Python dao_protocol port was missing the governor authority check for Telegram Chat Logs column S. Also identified GAS getRange reading only 19 columns (A-S) instead of 20 (A-T), preventing sentinel flag from being read. Implemented column T (Is Sentinel) end-to-end. Updated SENTINEL_ROLE_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md and triggered cache regeneration.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
